name: cognitive_search_agent
description: File Research Engine (FRE) — Cognitive Search Agent. Answers questions from a large enterprise document repository using hybrid semantic + keyword search across PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX files. Supports document Q&A with citations, page image previews, chart generation, statistical model fitting, and GCS-based document ingestion.

skills.name: Document Q&A
skills.description: Answer questions from the indexed enterprise document corpus using hybrid BM25 + semantic search (Elasticsearch + Vertex AI Vector Search + Vertex AI Search). Returns cited answers with source filenames and signed GCS URLs.
examples: What does our 2024 supplier audit report say about logistics risks?
Summarize the cybersecurity section of the latest compliance handbook.

skills.name: Document Page Preview
skills.description: Render and display specific pages of indexed PDF documents as inline images. Supports batch parallel preview of multiple pages across multiple documents.

skills.name: Chart & Statistical Model Generation
skills.description: Extract numerical data from document excerpts and generate charts (line, bar, pie, scatter, histogram) or fit statistical models (linear, polynomial, exponential) for what-if scenario analysis.

skills.name: Document Ingestion
skills.description: Index new documents from GCS into the hybrid search backend (Elasticsearch + Vertex AI Vector Search + PostgreSQL). Supports individual files and recursive folder scanning. Performs Gemini Vision OCR on image-heavy PDFs.

skills.name: System Status
skills.description: Report the current state of all search backends: document count, index health, embedding availability, and storage statistics.
